ABILITY_STENCH.name: Stench
ABILITY_STENCH.description: May cause a foe to flinch.

ABILITY_FLASH_FIRE.name: Flash Fire
ABILITY_FLASH_FIRE.description: Powers up if hit by fire.

ABILITY_OVERGROW.name: Overgrow
ABILITY_OVERGROW.description: Ups Grass moves in a pinch.

ABILITY_BLAZE.name: Blaze
ABILITY_BLAZE.description: Ups Fire moves in a pinch.

ABILITY_TORRENT.name: Torrent
ABILITY_TORRENT.description: Ups Water moves in a pinch.

ABILITY_SWARM.name: Swarm
ABILITY_SWARM.description: Ups Bug moves in a pinch.

ABILITY_SNOW_CLOAK.name: Snow Cloak
ABILITY_SNOW_CLOAK.description: Ups evasion in Hail or Snow.

ABILITY_UNBURDEN.name: Unburden
ABILITY_UNBURDEN.description: Using a hold item ups Speed.

ABILITY_SLOW_START.name: Slow Start
ABILITY_SLOW_START.description: Takes a while to get going.

ABILITY_ICE_BODY.name: Ice Body
ABILITY_ICE_BODY.description: HP recovery in Hail or Snow.

ABILITY_TELEPATHY.name: Telepathy
ABILITY_TELEPATHY.description: Can't be damaged by an ally.

ABILITY_SYMBIOSIS.name: Symbiosis
ABILITY_SYMBIOSIS.description: Passes its item to an ally.

ABILITY_BERSERK.name: Berserk
ABILITY_BERSERK.description: Boosts Sp. Atk at low HP.

ABILITY_COTTON_DOWN.name: Cotton Down
ABILITY_COTTON_DOWN.description: Lower Speed of all when hit.

ABILITY_GULP_MISSILE.name: Gulp Missile
ABILITY_GULP_MISSILE.description: If hit, spits prey from sea.

ABILITY_STEAM_ENGINE.name: Steam Engine
ABILITY_STEAM_ENGINE.description: Fire or Water hits up Speed.

ABILITY_ICE_FACE.name: Ice Face
ABILITY_ICE_FACE.description: Hail or Snow renew free hit.

ABILITY_PERISH_BODY.name: Perish Body
ABILITY_PERISH_BODY.description: Foe faints in 3 turns if hit.

ABILITY_WIND_RIDER.name: Wind Rider
ABILITY_WIND_RIDER.description: Ups Attack if hit by wind.
